---
title: "rep_analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2025-08-19"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Rep Analysis
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

# Figure 4B
## Sliding Window scoring of important domains in Rep adeno vs parvo
```{r}
# this input was produced by the model script
df<- read_csv("../intermediate_files/check_df.csv") %>%
  arrange(start) %>%
  mutate(interval=paste(start,stop,sep="-"))

```
```{r}
intervals<- seq(340, 460,by=10)
df %>%
  filter(start >= 339 & start <= 460) %>%
  ggplot(mapping=aes(x=start,y=auroc))+
  geom_line(size=1)+
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin=0, ymax=auroc))+
  #theme_classic()+
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(340, 460, by = 10),     # major labels every 10
    minor_breaks = seq(340, 460, by = 1) # minor ticks every 1
  )+
  geom_vline(xintercept=386, color="red", linetype="dashed")
```
